title: Open Dashboard and Verify Header
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the Dashboard screen. | Verify that the Header/App Bar contains the menu icon and the title 'Dashboard'.
expected_result: The Header/App Bar is visible with the menu icon and the title 'Dashboard'.

title: Click on 'HANGOUT NOW' Button
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the Dashboard screen. | Click on the 'HANGOUT NOW' button.
expected_result: The app transitions to the Hangout Now screen.

title: Navigate to 'View All' Button
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the Dashboard screen. | Scroll down to the bottom of the event list and click on the 'View All' button.
expected_result: The app navigates to the 'View All' screen, displaying all events.

title: Verify Event Details
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the Dashboard screen. | Select an event from the list to verify its details.
expected_result: The event details (title, location, date, time, number of attendees) are displayed.

title: Click on Event Title
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the Dashboard screen. | Select an event from the list and click on the event title.
expected_result: The app navigates to the event details screen.

title: Click on Event Location
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the Dashboard screen. | Select an event from the list and click on the event location.
expected_result: The app navigates to the event location screen.

title: Click on Event Date
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the Dashboard screen. | Select an event from the list and click on the event date.
expected_result: The app navigates to the event date screen.

title: Click on Event Time
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the Dashboard screen. | Select an event from the list and click on the event time.
expected_result: The app navigates to the event time screen.

title: Click on Event Attendees
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the Dashboard screen. | Select an event from the list and click on the event attendees.
expected_result: The app navigates to the event attendees screen.
